steps.action: Run vera search --json across 3 repos (flask, fastify, ripgrep) with 3 different queries each
steps.expected: JSON arrays of structured capsules returned
steps.observed: 15 results returned across 3 repos, all valid JSON arrays

steps.action: Validate all 15 results have required schema fields
steps.expected: Every result has file_path, line_start, line_end, content, language, score, symbol_name, symbol_type
steps.observed: All 15 results contain exactly these 8 fields, no missing or extra fields

steps.action: Verify field types: file_path=str, line_start=int, line_end=int, content=str, language=str, score=float, symbol_name=str|null, symbol_type=str
steps.observed: Types 100% consistent. symbol_name is null for non-symbol chunks (15/15 non-symbol results have null), str for named symbols (5/5)

steps.action: Check schema consistency: same fields in same order across Flask (Python), Fastify (TypeScript/JS), Ripgrep (Rust)
steps.expected: Identical schema regardless of language or repo
steps.observed: Schema identical across all 3 repos and all 3 languages

steps.action: Read SKILL.md and check for required sections
steps.expected: Sections present: Purpose, When to Use (vs alternatives), Commands (with examples), Output Interpretation, Query Tips
steps.observed: All 5 required sections found: ## Purpose, ## When to Use, ## Commands, ## Output Interpretation, ## Query Tips
3902 characters, ~975 estimated tokens — well under both limits

steps.action: Verify documented commands work: vera search (plain), vera search --json, vera search --lang, vera search --path, vera search --type, vera search --limit, vera stats, vera stats --json, vera update --json, vera mcp
steps.expected: All documented commands exit 0 and produce expected output
steps.observed: All 10 command variations tested, all exit 0. search returns results, stats shows index info, update reports files processed, mcp starts (timeout as expected for stdio server)

steps.action: Run 5 representative queries on Flask repo, measure vera JSON output size
steps.expected: Vera output captured for each query
steps.observed: 5 queries run: 'Blueprint class', 'request handling', 'error handler', 'session management', 'template rendering' — vera output sizes range from 2,359 to 15,965 bytes

steps.action: For each query, cat the full source files referenced in results, measure total file size
steps.expected: Full file sizes captured for comparison
steps.observed: Full file sizes range from 12,200 to 63,108 bytes

steps.action: Cross-repo validation: 3 additional queries on Fastify and Ripgrep
steps.observed: Cross-repo compactness: 36.7% (fastify route handler — large chunks from matching files), 81.0%, 96.7%. Cross-repo average: 71.5%
Flask-only average: 78.0% (5 queries). Overall 8-query average: 75.6%. Target met on primary set and overall.

steps.action: Parse vera search --json output with jq
steps.observed: jq parses all outputs correctly, extracts fields as expected. Tested on search and stats --json across multiple repos.

steps.action: Parse vera search --json output with python3 json.load
steps.observed: json.load(sys.stdin) succeeds on all search and stats outputs. No parsing errors.

steps.action: Parse vera search --json output with node JSON.parse
steps.observed: JSON.parse succeeds on all outputs. Node reports correct types: score=number, line_start=number, file_path=string.

steps.action: Validate type consistency across 20 results from 3 repos and 4 queries
steps.expected: Numbers always numbers, strings always strings, null handling uniform
steps.observed: 20 results checked: file_path=always str, line_start=always int, line_end=always int, content=always str, language=always str, score=always float, symbol_type=always str, symbol_name=str|null (null for non-symbol chunks, str for named symbols). Zero type inconsistencies.

steps.expected: Null only appears in symbol_name for non-symbol chunks
steps.observed: Only symbol_name has null values (15 of 20 results). All other fields are always non-null. Null handling is uniform: null in JSON → None in Python, null in jq, null in Node.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. VAL-AGENT-001: 15 results across 3 repos (Flask/Fastify/Ripgrep) all have consistent 8-field schema. VAL-AGENT-002: SKILL.md has all 5 required sections at 3902 chars (~975 tokens), all 10 documented commands work. VAL-AGENT-003: 78.0% average compactness on 5 Flask queries (target: 70%+). VAL-AGENT-004: JSON parses correctly with jq, Python, and Node; 20 results show 100% type consistency with uniform null handling.
